title: Tiny Tim: King for a Day
original_title: Tiny Tim: King for a Day
overview: The story of Tiny Tim’s improbable rise to stardom is the ultimate fairytale - and so is that of his downfall. For a brief time, the shy and truly unusual outsider artist was the biggest star in the world.
